name: Rhubarb Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the egg yolks, milk, and cornstarch in a bowl until well combined.
2. Gradually add the sugar to the mixture, whisking constantly to avoid lumps.
3. Pour the filling into an unbaked pie shell.
4. Dot the top of the filling with small pieces of butter.
5. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
6. Beat the egg whites and a small amount of sugar until stiff peaks form.
7. Spread the beaten egg whites over the rhubarb filling.
8. Return the pie to the oven and bake until the custard is set and the egg topping is golden brown.
